core_vaccines.name: Canine Distemper Virus (CDV)
core_vaccines.description: Protects against canine distemper, a serious viral disease affecting the respiratory, gastrointestinal, and nervous systems.

initial_series.puppies_under_16_weeks: At least 3 doses between 6 and 16 weeks of age, 2-4 weeks apart

core_vaccines.booster: Single dose within 1 year of last initial dose, then every 3 years

core_vaccines.name: Canine Parvovirus (CPV-2)
core_vaccines.description: Protects against parvovirus, a highly contagious virus causing severe vomiting, diarrhea, and potentially death in puppies.

initial_series.puppies_under_16_weeks: At least 3 doses between 6 and 16 weeks of age, 2-4 weeks apart

core_vaccines.booster: Single dose within 1 year of last initial dose, then every 3 years

core_vaccines.name: Canine Adenovirus Type 2 (CAV-2)
core_vaccines.description: Protects against infectious canine hepatitis and respiratory disease caused by adenovirus.

initial_series.puppies_under_16_weeks: At least 3 doses between 6 and 16 weeks of age, 2-4 weeks apart

core_vaccines.booster: Single dose within 1 year of last initial dose, then every 3 years

core_vaccines.name: Canine Parainfluenza Virus (CPiV)
core_vaccines.description: Protects against parainfluenza, a common contributor to kennel cough complex.

initial_series.puppies_under_16_weeks: At least 3 doses between 6 and 16 weeks of age, 2-4 weeks apart (often combined with CDV/CPV/CAV)

core_vaccines.booster: Single dose within 1 year of last initial dose, then every 3 years

core_vaccines.name: Leptospirosis (4-serovar)
core_vaccines.description: Protects against leptospirosis, a bacterial zoonotic disease transmitted through contaminated water and soil.

initial_series.puppies_under_16_weeks: 2 doses, 2-4 weeks apart, starting at 12 weeks of age

core_vaccines.booster: Single dose within 1 year of last initial dose, then annually

core_vaccines.name: Rabies
core_vaccines.description: Protects against rabies virus. Required by law in most jurisdictions. Fatal zoonotic disease.

initial_series.puppies_under_16_weeks: Single dose at 12-16 weeks as required by law
initial_series.dogs_over_16_weeks: Single dose as required by law

core_vaccines.booster: As required by law — typically 1 year after initial, then every 1-3 years depending on product and jurisdiction

noncore_vaccines.name: Bordetella bronchiseptica + Parainfluenza (Kennel Cough)
noncore_vaccines.description: Protects against kennel cough. Recommended for dogs that visit boarding facilities, dog parks, or grooming salons.

noncore_vaccines.name: Borrelia burgdorferi (Lyme Disease)
noncore_vaccines.description: Protects against Lyme disease. Recommended for dogs in endemic areas or those exposed to ticks.
noncore_vaccines.booster: Single dose within 1 year of last initial dose, then annually

noncore_vaccines.name: Canine Influenza Virus (H3N2/H3N8)
noncore_vaccines.description: Protects against canine influenza. Recommended for dogs in social environments or areas with outbreaks.
noncore_vaccines.booster: Single dose within 1 year of last initial dose, then annually
